full_text:
Gou Fu (Xiaoxing) 句扶 (孝興)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gou Fu (句扶), styledXiaoxing (孝興), was born in Hanchang County, Baxi Commandery. Treated second to Wang Ping for his battle achievements. Gou Fu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
